name: Basil Beer Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and sugar. Stir in the basil, then add the beer. Mix until thoroughly combined.
3. Pour the batter into a well-greased 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
4. Bake for about 50 minutes, or until a straw inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Turn the bread out of the pan and let it cool on a rack.
6. Slice the bread thinly.
